qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia as ID, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.c_tipohora as CODE, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.d_tipohora as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PER16_LICENCIAS, TTA01_TIPOHORAS, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Licencias.LICENCIA\') as SEC JOIN PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia LEFT OUTER SEC.id, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.oi_licencia INNER PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia WHERE PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia as ID, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.c_tipohora as CODE, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.d_tipohora as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PER16_LICENCIAS, TTA01_TIPOHORAS, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Licencias.LICENCIA\') as SEC JOIN PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia LEFT OUTER SEC.id, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.oi_licencia INNER PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia WHERE TTA01_TIPOHORAS.c_tipohora={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia as ID, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.c_tipohora as CODE, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.d_tipohora as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PER16_LICENCIAS, TTA01_TIPOHORAS, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Licencias.LICENCIA\') as SEC JOIN PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia LEFT OUTER SEC.id, TTA01_TIPOHORAS.oi_licencia INNER PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW
